creator: crest_maintainer@rlwinm.de
text:
Created attachment 163016
fastd port (fixed)

Remove a workaround for a fixed bug in the libuecc port.

The libuecc port installed libuecc.pc into ${PREFIX}/lib/pkgconfig instead of ${PREFIX}/libdata/pkgconfig. This required fastd to tell pkg-config about ${PREFIX}/lib/pkgconfig.
